title: TenantBuildConfig
description: Per-tenant configuration injected into the Expo app config at build time.

slug.description: URL-safe slug. Must match the folder name and the tenants.slug column in DB.

tenantId.description: UUID of the tenant in the database. Baked into the app at build time.

appName.description: Full display name shown on the home screen and in stores.

appShortName.description: Optional short name when space is limited.

scheme.description: Deep-link scheme. Must be globally unique.

bundleId.description: iOS bundle identifier. Reverse-DNS. Must be globally unique.

androidPackage.description: Android package name. Reverse-DNS. Must be globally unique.

primaryColor.description: Brand primary color. Should match tenants.branding.primaryColor.

easProjectId.description: Expo EAS project ID, created via `eas init` for this tenant.
